# Yuto Tachibana (立花 優斗)

> Engineering Capitalist based in Tokyo, Japan — an engineer who builds and invests. Personal profile and link collection.

## About

Yuto Tachibana began his career at NTT COMWARE, where he led new business initiatives for government agencies by applying advanced technologies. He later joined several startups as an engineering manager and head of development, leading 0-to-1 development, team building, and growth. In 2022, he joined a newly established DeNA joint venture, where he served as tech lead and worked on business development. In 2025, he joined Delight Ventures. Today, he provides hands-on support to portfolio companies across both technology and business development while also engaging in investment activities. As an engineer-turned-capitalist, he works alongside founders to support business growth from hypothesis to implementation.

## Current Positions

### Full-time
- Delight Ventures, Inc. - https://www.delight-ventures.com/en/team/yuto-tachibana

## Data Format

This site's profile data is available in structured JSON format at:
- https://tachibanayu24.com/me.json

The JSON schema is defined at:
- https://tachibanayu24.com/me.schema.json

## Interests

Startups, Fitness, Sauna, Cooking, Rabbits, Shogi, Real Estate, Stock Market, Comedy, AI in Large Industries, AI-native funds

## Language

This site supports both English and Japanese. Content is managed through me.json with language-specific fields.
